text: Renaissance Pendidikan Agama Islam (PAI) yang menangangi pilar agidah dan akhlak untuk mencari cara meningkatkan kemampuan mengandung esensi makna pembelajaran PAI serta untuk menciptakan lompatan pengetahuan karakter yang komprehensif bagi semua warga pendidikan melalui aplikasi ilmu agama pada konteks kehidupan sehari hari yang akan menangkal terjadi dari setiap nilai-nilai Islam. Empat pilar pokok aqidah menunjuk kementaraahuan manusia terhadap keesaan Allah. Adapun akhlah artinya menyangkut aplikasinya dalam cara bernilai atau bersikap membayangi keesahan Allah. The Value of Introducing Pillars of Aqidah and Akhlah in the Context of Globalization: Lesson from the Methodology of the Prophets According to the Quran and Hadith This study carried out in this book explored through pedagogical examples which could enable the teaching and learning of Islam based on the principles of the Quran and Hadith to guarantee a proficient students of PAI who could function as a bulwark against deviant ideas that thrived as a result of the influence of the globalization and social media in which deviant teachings that opposed Islamic value are dominant. In this respect the introduction of aqidah and akhlah in Islamic educational curriculum could prepare students with strong moral character and values to overcome the impact of globalisation and challenges posed by social media. Thus, the curriculum should be designed towards developing values that will promote the rejuvenation of the morals of the Muslim Ummah. Therefore, the government is requested to improve upon the education policy on the PAI curriculum.
